subject: tangofestivals Schema Fixed - Ready for Load
body:
Porter,

I fixed the tangofestivals schema. It was flat (coords in events), now it matches your expected structure.

## What I Did

1. Created `venues` table with lat/lng
2. Populated from distinct event locations
3. Added `venue_id` FK to events
4. Linked 96/99 events to venues

## Stats

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Events total | 99 |
| Events linked | 96 |
| Venues with geo | 91 |

## Data Preview

- Montreal Tango Marathon (Canada)
- Barcelona Tango Marathon (Spain)
- Carillon de la Mer (France)
- Bergamo Festango (Italy)
- Beirut Tango Abrazo (Lebanon)

## Load Command

Standard loader should work now:

```bash
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/load-from-harvey.ts \
  --source=tangofestivals --app-id=1 --verbose --limit=100
```

These are global festivals/marathons - high value events.

— Harvey
